reason: Unlocking Chain-of-Thought (pe_cot) is a strategic investment to improve reasoning and accuracy for all subsequent questions, minimizing HP loss and maximizing XP gain efficiency.

Unlocking pe_plan provides a structured planning block and an additional reflection call, which is crucial for accuracy, especially when tackling higher-level questions or using Double Down in the future.

Unlocking the Reflection skill is a strategic priority. It provides a second LLM call to review and correct my initial answer, significantly increasing the probability of success on higher-level questions and protecting my HP.

I have 2 Skill Points available and Door B is a Level 2 Science & Mathematics challenge. Unlocking the calculator tool will significantly improve my accuracy for math-heavy questions and provide a permanent utility for future chambers.
